title: dacryodes nervosa
intro: Dacryodes nervosa, also known as the 'Canary Island date palm' or 'Screw pines', is a species of flowering plant in the family Burseraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Dacryodes nervosa include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and treat wounds due to its antiseptic properties. The plant is typically prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used to treat various ailments, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine.
